title: Decorative Hanging Plants for Shelf, Faux Ivy Eucalyptus Vine, Fake Greenery in White Pot (Light Green, 2PCS)
features: 【Realistic Design】Displaying trailing eucalyptus in white pots hanging decor, realistic & lifelike design, mini sized and space saved.2 pack look more full
【High Quality】Artificial leaves are made with high quality and safe durable plastic material. The leaves have different tones and sizes making it look very realistic.

【Decent Size】The whole hangings vine approx 23.6" / 60CM long (but you could vary it shorter or longer), comes with 11x artificial plastic eucalyptus vine leaves trails. The size of the flower pot is 9.5*8.5CM(W x H)
【More Uses】You can hang on the wall, shelf, coffee table, dresser, or nightstandand, mantle anywhere as you like to enjoy with our faux hanging potted plants.
【Customer Service】If you have any question during the use, please do not hesitate to contact us, we will help you solve the problem with 100% satisfaction.
description: Product Description BACAMA artificial trailing plants in pots are light-weight and odorless, having a right size in nice shelves and lighter green color, very warm for indoors.You can hang on the wall, shelf, coffee table, dresser, or nightstandand anywhere as you like to enjoy with our faux hanging potted plants. Warm Tips: 1. After open the package, please take 3-5 minutes to adjust its leaves and stems. To get them more natural looking. 2. Because the artificial vine is produced by chemical process, it is normal to have some plastic smell and it won’t cause any harm to the human body. The smell can be eliminated by placing the vines in the ventilated place for a while.
